text: People want to find their passion, but
you don't find it, you create it.
And you create it by getting good at
something.
And to get good at stuff, you start by
doing something you suck at. Then you
get good, then you like it, then people
ask how you found your passion. Answer:
by starting when you sucked and not
giving up.
Yeah, I hate the passion mantra. I
really do. I mean, part of it was
because um

And so, as soon as I started the gym,
my passion

And he was a guy who was a very

everything will suck,
